serviceNotes.engine oil: CBS oil service MFR 30,000 km / 24 months EU maximum with Long-Life oil (SIB B000214 / service display).
serviceNotes.micro filter: Interior filter at every engine oil change (30,000 km CBS ceiling) per garage.wiki F30.
serviceNotes.brake fluid: Replace every 24 months after the first change; garage.wiki notes first brake fluid change at 3 years then every 2 years — follow owner’s manual for your market.
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: Air filter each second engine oil service (2 × 30,000 km = 60,000 km) per garage.wiki F30.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: Changed from 90,000 km to 60,000 km: spark plugs with each second engine oil change (all other modifications row, garage.wiki F30).
serviceNotes.check front brake pads: Inspect per CBS; 30,000 km planning interval (pre-LCI F30).
serviceNotes.check rear brake pads: Inspect per CBS; 30,000 km planning interval (pre-LCI F30).
serviceNotes.vehicle check: BMW CBS vehicle check / inspection service.
serviceNotes.ZF8 gearbox fluid: Applies to 8-speed automatic models. ZF often recommends fluid exchange around 100,000 km despite lifetime-fill wording.
serviceNotes.manual gearbox fluid: Manual gearbox: preventive oil exchange around 100,000 km is a common workshop recommendation.
serviceNotes.xDrive transfer case fluid: xDrive models only. Often labelled lifetime; many specialists recommend 60,000–100,000 km.
serviceNotes.differential fluids: xDrive models only. Often labelled lifetime; many specialists recommend 60,000–100,000 km.
serviceNotes.coolant flush: Preventive coolant exchange around 120,000 km maintains corrosion protection.
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: Direct injection can cause intake valve deposits; walnut/chemical clean around 120,000 km is a common recommendation.

serviceSources.engine oil: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS intervals) — 30,000 km / 24 months EU maximum. https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f30/2012/service-intervals.html
serviceSources.micro filter: https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f30/2012/service-intervals.html — interior filter at every engine oil change
serviceSources.brake fluid: https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f30/2012/service-intervals.html — first change 3 years then every 2 years; BMW owner's manual F30
serviceSources.air cleaner element: https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f30/2012/service-intervals.html — air filter with each second engine oil change (60,000 km)
serviceSources.spark plugs: Changed from 90,000 km to 60,000 km per https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f30/2012/service-intervals.html — all other modifications: second oil change
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 30,000 km planning interval
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 30,000 km planning interval
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 — vehicle check every second engine oil service (60,000 km)
